title: Company Names Tribunal decision: HWCD Associates (London) Limited
body: "Application number 5103  Applicant HWCD Holding Ltd objected to the name used by HWCD Associates (London) Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 2 April 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of HWCD Associates (London) Limited is changed to 15848336, LTD. "
